title: alyssum nezaketiae
intro: Alyssum nezaketiae, also known as sweet alyssum or sweet alison, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including relieving anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues, as well as promoting digestion and immune function. Alyssum nezaketiae can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in herbal remedies to soothe and calm the body and mind.
